onboarding.title: Your daily personal AI assistant
onboarding.terms_prefix: By continuing you are agreeing to our
onboarding.business_desc: Professional business support services including government transactions, legal advice, marketing solutions, and recruitment assistance.
onboarding.home_desc: Professional home services for cleaning, repairs, gardening, and household maintenance—delivered with reliability and expert care.
onboarding.deliver_desc: Professional courier service for delivery between merchants and customers including product returns or exchange.
onboarding.shop_desc: Get fast and smooth service for delivering food and coffee meals at the best prices.
onboarding.booking_desc: On-demand booking for all your needs, from medical appointments and salon sessions to home cleaning, maintenance, and beyond.
onboarding.government_desc: Complete your government transactions, book hospital appointments, and manage home maintenance with ease
onboarding.daily_title: Your Daily Life in One Step
onboarding.daily_desc: Order your favorite meals, shop from supermarkets, or request delivery with just one tap
onboarding.special_moment_desc: Get assistance with event planning, gift shopping, and making reservations for unforgettable experiences

orders.cancel_order_confirmation: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
orders.cancel_order_reason_hint: Please tell us why you want to cancel...
orders.finish_order_check_1: The service has been completed as agreed
orders.finish_order_check_2: I have paid the partner the agreed amount
orders.finish_order_check_3: I am satisfied with the quality of work
orders.finish_order_read_more_text: By confirming, you acknowledge that the partner has completed the service as requested. Once confirmed, the order will be marked as completed and you will be able to rate your experience. If you have any issues, please contact support before confirming.
orders.resubmit_confirmation: Are you sure you want to resubmit this order? A new order will be created with the same details.
orders.are_you_sure_you_want_to_resubmit_order: Are you sure you want to resubmit this order? A new order will be created with the same details.
orders.dont_have_active_jobs: You don't have any active jobs
orders.new_orders_appear_instantly: Any new orders will appear here instantly.
orders.monitor_requests_description: Monitor every request and keep customers delighted.
orders.please_wait_for_bids: Please wait for bids from our partners to appear...
orders.no_favorites_desc: Orders you mark as favorites will appear here
orders.delivery_request_success: Your delivery request has been successfully created.✅

bidding.no_bids_yet: No bids yet. Please check back later.
bidding.no_bids_yet_message: No one has applied for this order yet. Please wait and try again later.
bidding.looking_for_bidder: Looking for bidder to execute your request...
bidding.change_bid_confirmation_body: Are you sure you want to change the accepted bid? This will allow you to select another partner.
bidding.desc_1: Submit the request to a group of service providers and get the best prices
bidding.desc_2: Communicate with the service provider after accepting the offer
bidding.benefits_subtitle: Get the best value for your requests
bidding.benefit_1_desc: Receive multiple offers and choose the one that fits your budget.
bidding.benefit_2_desc: Chat with providers to discuss details after accepting the offer.
bidding.benefit_3_desc: You decide who to hire based on ratings, reviews, and portfolio.
bidding.disclaimer_point_1: Bidding service providers operate independently and are not directly managed by the company. As they represent themselves, their service may not always align with our standard VIP quality protocols.
bidding.disclaimer_point_2: For your safety, we strongly recommend keeping all communications and payments within the app. The company is not responsible for any interactions occurring outside our secure platform.
bidding.communication_warning_message: Please note that our application is not responsible for any communication or transactions that occur outside of the app platform. Always conduct business interactions within the app to ensure your safety and protection.
bidding.service_selection_clarification_body: Since no service was selected, we can't determine if your request qualifies for Bidding or VIP. The AI will assist you and will ask you later if the requested service supports Bidding. For a specific service type, please select a service first.

vip.vip_order_message: This is a VIP order. A dedicated team is assigned to your request. Expect a call or WhatsApp message from us shortly.
vip.vip_tracking_description: Your VIP order is being handled directly by our professional team. Unlike regular orders, VIP orders are managed and completed by us to ensure the highest quality of service.
vip.vip_tracking_vip_explanation: VIP orders are fulfilled by our own team, not by third-party providers. This means faster response, guaranteed quality, and a dedicated point of contact for your request.
vip.desc_1: Direct and professional execution by our team to ensure the highest levels of quality and accuracy
vip.disclaimer_point_1: One of our dedicated operations team members will reach out to you via WhatsApp to coordinate your request.
vip.disclaimer_point_2: Please note that the VIP service includes a nominal service fee, which is separate from the final execution price of the service itself.

payment.processing_message: We are processing your secure transaction. Please do not close or navigate away from this page to ensure everything completes perfectly.

subscription.subscription_required_desc: Dear customer, to serve you in the best possible way, we would like to inform you that you have exceeded the free subscription limit. Please choose one of our packages to enjoy our premium services ✨
subscription.no_plans_available: No subscription plans available at the moment.
subscription.login_required_desc: Please login to subscribe to a plan and enjoy unlimited orders and priority support.
subscription.success_message: You have successfully subscribed. Enjoy unlimited orders and priority support.
subscription.failed_message: Payment was not successful. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

services.service_preference: I want my service to be

service_details.delivery_services_description: Professional courier services for delivery between merchants and customers, including product returns or exchanges
service_details.paper_delivery_description: Fast and accurate delivery of papers and personal items, making it easier for users to manage their documents and daily needs
service_details.errands_service_title: Errands Service for Individuals and Companies
service_details.errands_service_description: Transporting individuals and school students at the best prices with daily and monthly contracts
service_details.food_delivery_description: Get fast and smooth service for delivering food and coffee meals at the best prices
service_details.shopping_delivery_description: We can deliver your purchases from malls to home, as well as from central markets, fruit and fish markets, supermarkets, and various associations
service_details.luggage_delivery_description: We can transport your goods and bags and deliver them to the airport and from the airport to your doorstep, as well as cooperate with shipping companies at the best prices
service_details.safety_equipment_title: Safety and Security Equipment Delivery and Installation
service_details.safety_equipment_description: Fire extinguisher delivery and installation service in all sizes, home safety box, fire sensor, or kitchen fire blanket, or civil defense requirements for building completion
service_details.medicine_delivery_title: Medicine Delivery Service from Pharmacies and Hospitals
service_details.medicine_delivery_description: We can get all medicines through health centers and various pharmacies, as well as from beauty clinics and body care centers
service_details.invitation_delivery_title: Wedding Cards and Official Invitations Delivery
service_details.invitation_delivery_description: We can also cooperate with printing houses to make and deliver your invitations and occasions to guests for weddings and various parties
service_details.charity_delivery_title: Clothing Delivery Service for Charitable Organizations
service_details.charity_delivery_description: We can deliver used clothes to charitable organizations and place them in donation cars and containers
service_details.flowers_delivery_description: Delivery of roses, chocolate, and romantic gifts throughout the city
service_details.appointment_booking_description: Our services include booking hospital appointments, beauty clinics, health centers, spas, massage, and physiotherapy, whether for doctor interviews or any other services the user needs. We ensure effective and reliable coordination
service_details.hotel_booking_description: Hotel and resort bookings, chalets, cabins, domestic and international travel, and we guarantee you the best prices and finest services in luxury hotels and tourist resorts with complete coordination for your trip
service_details.restaurant_booking_description: Coordination of banquets, parties, and special occasions with menu preparation and kitchen setup. We provide luxury restaurant booking services, table booking in hotel lobbies, buffet organization, and wedding hall booking at the best prices
service_details.event_coordination_description: Event and special occasion coordination service with providing all necessary requirements and details
service_details.sports_booking_description: Booking paddle courts, football, volleyball, and beach courts
service_details.haircut_booking_description: Book a personal barber for home or hotel, as well as book women's salon
service_details.cinema_booking_description: Cinema booking to enjoy the latest movies and ensure you reach the cinema with all your requirements prepared from popcorn and various juices
service_details.car_rental_description: To rent a car during travel, and it can be by day or by week
service_details.theater_booking_description: Theater and summer festival booking with limited seats
service_details.driving_course_description: Book driving courses, English learning courses, and summer and winter courses
service_details.mall_porter_title: Mall and Central Market Porter Service
service_details.mall_porter_description: We can provide porters for you at Vendome Palace Mall in Lusail, Doha Festival City, Qatar Mall, as well as in central markets, Saliya Market, and Umm Salal Market. You can request the service and have it ready for you at the gate upon your arrival at the place where you want to shop
service_details.home_maintenance_description: Providing electricians to fix home malfunctions and pipe fitters to install and repair sanitary materials
service_details.gardening_service_description: For caring for home agriculture and gardens regularly and placing appropriate fertilizers at reasonable prices and within everyone's reach
service_details.laundry_service_description: We can help you with ironing and washing clothes, as well as carpets and rugs at the best prices, speed, and quality required
service_details.cleaning_service_description: Home and office cleaning services with the highest quality and reliability standards, and providing hostesses and baristas for your private and public occasions
service_details.government_services_description: Help in completing government and official transactions with saving time and effort
service_details.legal_consultation_description: Specialized legal consultations with qualified lawyers in all fields
service_details.advertising_description: We can help you with marketing, printing, and connecting with social media celebrities and influencers and running advertising campaigns
service_details.jobs_service_description: You can request all the jobs you want through us, as well as request a specific job, and we can help you in the fastest and best ways available
service_details.marketplace_title: Merchants and Traders Market and Home Projects
service_details.marketplace_description: We work to provide a professional and suitable space to display your products, as well as help you with storage, marketing, delivery, and connecting with customers using the best modern methods and with the help of artificial intelligence tools
service_details.contracting_description: We can help you find suitable real estate and help you in the construction process and building maintenance by providing the best prices, brokers, and real estate and contracting companies
service_details.auctions_title: Activating Auctions for Collectibles, Antiques, Classic Cars and Electrical Tools
service_details.auctions_description: Activating auctions through artificial intelligence, we can soon activate the auction service professionally and know the appropriate product price with speed and high accuracy
service_details.roadside_assistance_description: 24/7 roadside assistance service with specialized technicians to solve all emergency problems
service_details.home_maintenance_car_title: Home Maintenance and Battery Replacement Service
service_details.home_maintenance_car_description: Comprehensive car maintenance at your home with battery replacement and checking all systems
service_details.car_wash_description: Car washing and cleaning at your home using the best materials and equipment
service_details.thermal_protection_description: Installation of thermal insulation and car protection from external factors with quality guarantee
service_details.tire_repair_description: Tire repair and replacement with pressure and balance checking
service_details.car_transport_description: Safe car transport service to any place you want while maintaining its safety
service_details.fuel_service_description: Car fuel refueling with fuel level and system checking
service_details.oil_change_description: Engine oil and filter replacement with checking all fluids and systems
service_details.brake_service_description: Brake pad replacement and complete brake system inspection to ensure safety
service_details.wiper_service_description: Front and rear glass wiper replacement with wiper blade cleaning
service_details.ac_service_description: Air conditioning system maintenance and internal filter cleaning to ensure clean air
service_details.electrical_repair_description: Repair of all electrical and electronic systems in the car
service_details.key_programming_description: Programming new car keys and repairing damaged keys
service_details.pre_purchase_inspection_description: Comprehensive car inspection before purchase with detailed condition report
service_details.paint_repair_description: Repair scratches and repaint damaged parts with color matching guarantee
service_details.polishing_service_description: Comprehensive car polishing from inside and outside using the best materials

permissions.microphone_permission_body: We need access to your microphone and speech recognition to process your voice requests. This makes it easier for you to communicate with us.
permissions.microphone_permission_permanent_body: Access to audio permissions has been permanently denied. Please enable them from settings to use voice recording.
permissions.speech_permission_body: We need access to speech recognition to convert your voice to text. Please enable it to use voice recording.

misc.soft_open: We are currently in Soft Open phase
misc.soft_open_desc_1: We are currently in our Soft Open phase, a humble beginning to something extraordinary. Every moment, our team is working with immense passion and dedication to refine every detail of your experience.
misc.soft_open_desc_2: You deserve nothing less than absolute perfection, and we are striving tirelessly to elevate our services to the premium quality you truly merit. Thank you for being our early believer and for walking this path with us.
misc.tutorial_question: Do you know the difference between VIP and bidding?
misc.tutorial_confirm_dont_show: Are you sure you don't want to see this tutorial video again?
